**Summary**
A short paragraph explaining what this PR does and *why*. Skip the *what* —
the diff already shows that.

**Type of change**
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behaviour changes)
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Docs / build / chore

**Related issue**
Closes #

**Checklist**
- [ ] `swift build` passes locally
- [ ] `swift test` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests under `Tests/VOCACoreTests` for new pure-Swift logic
- [ ] Ran the app (`./scripts/build-app.sh && open dist/VOCA.app`) and verified the change
- [ ] Updated user-facing copy and `README.md` if behaviour changed
- [ ] Added an entry under `## Unreleased` in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] No API keys, audio recordings, or personal data in the diff

**Test plan**
How a reviewer can verify this works. List the manual steps you ran, plus any
edge cases you checked.
